headline.purpose: Results, country profiles, and rich drawers.

title.purpose: HUD context, country names, and sheet headings.

body.purpose: Readable app copy and country facts.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Drawers, input docks, and map insets.

shadows.name: success-glow
shadows.purpose: Start Quiz emphasis and short-lived success feedback.

motion.name: feedback-pulse
motion.purpose: One-shot correct, assisted, missed, or complete feedback.

motion.name: map-pulse-cadence
motion.purpose: Preserve target motion without continuous repaint loops.

components.name: Primary Quiz Button
components.description: The action that starts or resumes a quiz. It is the strongest control in setup state.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(209,250,229,0.48); background: rgba(52,211,153,0.28); color: #f8fafc; padding: 0 24px; font: 600 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 0 34px rgba(52,211,153,0.18); transition: background 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(52,211,153,0.36); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(167,243,208,0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Glass Chip
components.description: Compact map overlay chip for region, quiz, and contextual actions.
components.css: .ds-chip-glass { min-height: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(24,24,27,0.58); color: rgba(248,250,252,0.76); padding: 8px 16px; font: 600 14px/1.2 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); transition: background 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-chip-glass:hover { background: rgba(24,24,27,0.68); color: #f8fafc; } .ds-chip-glass:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(186,230,253,0.7); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Quiz Input Dock
components.description: Safe-area-aware bottom input for type, identify, and capital modes.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-label" for="ds-country-input">Type a country name</label><input id="ds-country-input" class="ds-input-quiz" placeholder="Type a country..." />
components.css: .ds-input-label { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); } .ds-input-quiz { width: 100%; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); color: #f8fafc; padding: 0 16px; text-align: center; font: 500 16px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-input-quiz::placeholder { color: rgba(248,250,252,0.36); } .ds-input-quiz:focus { border-color: rgba(52,211,153,0.40); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.14); box-shadow: 0 0 34px rgba(52,211,153,0.16); }

components.name: Glass Sheet
components.description: Bottom sheet or drawer container for setup, learning cards, and review details.
components.css: .ds-sheet { border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); background: rgba(9,15,26,0.72); color: #f8fafc; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.36); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); } .ds-sheet-label { margin: 0; color: rgba(248,250,252,0.44); font: 600 10px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-sheet-title { margin: 8px 0 0; color: rgba(248,250,252,0.86); font: 600 18px/1.25 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Country Dossier
components.description: Rich country education card with flag, facts, featured image, and concise narrative.
components.css: .ds-dossier { border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(186,230,253,0.16); background: rgba(15,23,42,0.55); color: #f8fafc; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(8,18,32,0.38); } .ds-dossier-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; } .ds-flag { display: grid; place-items: center; width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10); font: 700 14px/1 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dossier h3 { margin: 0; font: 600 24px/1.15 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-dossier p { margin: 4px 0 0; color: rgba(207,250,254,0.54); font: 500 14px/1.4 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dossier dl { margin: 16px 0 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .ds-dossier dl div { padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); } .ds-dossier dt { color: rgba(248,250,252,0.58); font: 500 14px/1.4 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dossier dd { margin: 4px 0 0; color: rgba(248,250,252,0.88); font: 600 16px/1.25 Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: GeoMaster is a premium atlas that becomes a game without losing the calm authority of the map. The interface should feel like a focused command layer floating over a beautiful globe: dark, precise, compact, and deferential to Mapbox. Every visible control must earn its place because the map is the product surface.
keyCharacteristics: Map-first: overlays stay compact by default and expand only when the user asks.
Premium dark atlas: deep zinc surfaces, cyan geography accents, emerald success feedback.
Game clarity: correct is green, assisted is amber, missed is rose, and those meanings never drift.
Mobile discipline: one large surface at a time, 44px touch targets, safe-area-aware controls.

rules.name: The Feedback Color Rule
rules.body: Green means correct, amber means assisted, rose means missed or wrong. These colors are semantic, not decorative.

rules.name: The Cyan Geography Rule
rules.body: Cyan belongs to map targets, learning affordances, focus states, and brand atmosphere. Do not use it for destructive or completion states.

rules.name: The Label Restraint Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracking is for metadata only. Never use spaced uppercase for body text or country stories.

rules.name: The Map Glass Rule
rules.body: Use blur only for overlays that sit directly on the map. Do not use glass for ordinary nested content inside an already-glass panel.

dos: Do keep the map as the visual majority on every viewport.
Do use the blue GeoMaster globe icon as the canonical brand mark.
Do keep Start Quiz visually stronger than Choose Quiz when setup is open.
Do preserve 44px minimum touch targets on mobile controls.
Do use bottom sheets for mobile setup, learning details, and review.
Do keep feedback colors semantic: green correct, amber assisted, rose missed.
Do cap motion and Mapbox animation cadence. Feedback should be short, purposeful, and quiet.
donts: Don't turn Learning Mode into quiz setup. It should feel like calm atlas exploration.
Don't show every label at world zoom or force tiny-country labels to overlap.
Don't stack the correct toast and Caribbean inset on mobile.
Don't use generic SaaS card grids, hero metrics, gradient text, or decorative side stripes.
Don't use glassmorphism as default content styling. Glass exists because there is a map behind it.
Don't add background audio or ambient soundscapes. Only short feedback sounds are allowed.
Don't make desktop worse to solve mobile. Preserve the desktop atlas HUD quality.
